name: My work comp for lung disease got denied in West Valley City, now what?
description: Appeal to Utah Labor Commission within 30 days with stronger medical proof of work causation.[6]

mainEntity.name: My work comp for lung disease got denied in West Valley City, now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal to Utah Labor Commission within 30 days with stronger medical proof of work causation.[6]
acceptedAnswer.description: Appeal the denial to the Utah Labor Commission within 30 days of the decision notice.[6] Denials often stem from late reporting, lack of causation proof, or misclassification under WCA vs. ODA.[1][6] Key factors: strong medical evidence tying illness to job exposure, timely employer notification within 180 days, and no intentional tort override unless proven.[1] Gather witness statements, expert opinions, and refile or request a hearing; many overturned denials succeed with better documentation. Persistence with professional guidance often restores benefits.
